message:
style(oneshot,connection): rustfmt formatting cleanup in test code

Applies rustfmt-canonical formatting to two test files:
- oneshot.rs: rewrap Waker::from(Arc::new(CountWaker(...))) call
- connection.rs: collapse multi-line assert_with_log! macro to single line

No behavioral changes — formatting only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
